---
name: Agent Feedback
about: Provide feedback on an existing agent in the playbook
title: "[Feedback] <Agent Name> — <Section>"
labels: ["feedback", "documentation"]
assignees: []
---

## Which Agent?

**Agent name:** 
**Agent file:** (e.g., `ideas/identity/break-glass-account-validator.md`)

---

## Feedback Type

- [ ] Incorrect information
- [ ] Outdated content (API changed, permissions changed, etc.)
- [ ] Missing content (important section is incomplete)
- [ ] Architecture recommendation should change
- [ ] Permissions listed are insufficient or excessive
- [ ] Business value claim needs evidence
- [ ] Other

---

## Specific Section

Which section of the agent doc does this feedback relate to?

- [ ] Problem Statement
- [ ] Agent Concept
- [ ] Architecture
- [ ] Implementation Steps
- [ ] Required Permissions
- [ ] Security & Compliance Controls
- [ ] Business Value & Success Metrics
- [ ] Example Use Cases
- [ ] Alternative Approaches
- [ ] YAML Frontmatter

---

## What Is Wrong or Missing?

*Describe the issue with the current content.*

---

## Suggested Correction

*What should the content say instead? If you have a specific fix, paste it here.*

---

## Evidence or Reference

*If this is a factual correction (e.g., a Graph API endpoint changed), please provide a reference link.*

---

## Have You Tested This?

- [ ] Yes, I have tested this in a live tenant
- [ ] No, this is based on documentation review
- [ ] This is based on a deployment failure I experienced
